Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind

Class EqualitySolver

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind.EqualitySolver
public final class EqualitySolver extends Object
This class is the external interface to the union-find data structures formed by nodes that are equal. It contains all necessary operations (add fact, add query, add instantiation). It keeps the SourceTable up to date. Backtracking and removal of query and instantiations is not done at this level.
